info.name: Stables-HT-HOL-ONLY-time-daily-1-fix1
info.description:
HOL-ONLY stablecoin4: BEHAVIORAL PROBES + ROLLING MATURITY (Option B)
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

REQUIRES: Java Option B fix (maturityDate filter in contractStart)
  ContractModel.parse() + 4 stablecoin model classes

TWO-TIER DECISION ARCHITECTURE:
  Tier 1: /behaviorStateAt probes (4 calls per epoch)
    - RedemptionPressure: 609-event calibrated redemption curve
    - EarlyWarning: 4 validated signals (F1=0.63-0.80)
    - BackingRatio: reserve coverage + liquidity gap
    - MaturityLadder: 4-tier defensive posture
    Replaces crude JS threshold checks with calibrated model outputs.

  Tier 2: ACTUS scenarioSimulation (1 call when action needed)
    - Rolling maturityDate = currentDay + LOOK_AHEAD
    - Java maturityDate filter clips callouts to [IED, maturity]
    - PP=0 confirms near-term safety; PP>0 quantifies redemption

CONFIGURABLE:
  cfg_look_ahead:      Days ahead for ACTUS maturity (default: 3)
  cfg_epoch_mode:      'daily' or 'adaptive' (default: daily)
  cfg_initial_cash:    Starting cash (default: $150,000)
  cfg_target_usdc:     Target USDC (default: $75,000)
  cfg_deposit_pct:     % of available cash per deposit (default: 30%)
  cfg_min_cash_reserve: Floor (default: $30,000)

EXPECTED FULL CYCLE (45 days):
  Days 1-3:   SAFE probes → DEPOSIT + ACTUS confirms → USDC=$75K
  Days 4-17:  SAFE probes → HOLD at target
  Day 15-18:  ACTUS +3d window starts seeing stress → PP fires
  Days 18-27: RISKY probes → REDEEM via ACTUS PP
  Days 28-32: HOLD probes (transitional)
  Days 33-35: SAFE probes → re-DEPOSIT
  Days 36-45: SAFE → HOLD at target (second cycle)


FIX1 (2026-03-10): Added Phase 4.5 — POST /scenarioSimulationStart
  to activate scenario on risksrv3 before epoch runner.
  Without this, /behaviorStateAt returns 500 (currentBehaviorModel=null)
  because only /scenarioSimulationStart populates it.
  ISS/ISS-HOL collections not affected (they use rf2/scenarioSimulation
  on 8083 which internally activates the scenario).

exec: console.log('  /behaviorStateAt probes will work for Tier 1 decisions');
var pad = function(n) { return n < 10 ? '0' + n : '' + n; };
console.log('HOL-ONLY stablecoin4: BEHAVIORAL PROBES + ROLLING MATURITY');
console.log('  Option B Java fix: maturityDate filter in contractStart()');
console.log('  LOOK_AHEAD=' + LOOK_AHEAD + ' days | epochMode=' + epochMode);
// Call /behaviorStateAt for each model to get calibrated risk assessment
// These replace the crude JS threshold checks from fix4/fix5/fix6
var probeNP = usdc > 0 ? -usdc : -1000;  // negative = liability convention
states: { notionalPrincipal: probeNP, nominalInterestRate: 0.0, statusDate: dayDate,
states: { notionalPrincipal: probeNP, nominalInterestRate: 0, statusDate: dayDate,
}, function(err, res) { try { probes.rp = parseFloat(res.text()); } catch(e) { probes.rp = -1; } checkDone(); });
states: { notionalPrincipal: probeNP, nominalInterestRate: 0, statusDate: dayDate,
}, function(err, res) { try { probes.ew = parseFloat(res.text()); } catch(e) { probes.ew = -1; } checkDone(); });
states: { notionalPrincipal: probeNP, nominalInterestRate: 0, statusDate: dayDate,
}, function(err, res) { try { probes.br = parseFloat(res.text()); } catch(e) { probes.br = -1; } checkDone(); });
states: { notionalPrincipal: probeNP, nominalInterestRate: 0, statusDate: dayDate,
}, function(err, res) { try { probes.ml = parseFloat(res.text()); } catch(e) { probes.ml = -1; } checkDone(); });
// SAFE: all models return 0.0 (no risk signals)
// RISKY: any model fires meaningful signal
if (ppPayoff > 0) { cash += ppPayoff; usdc = Math.max(0, usdc - ppPayoff); }
day: dayNum, cash: Math.round(cash), usdc: Math.round(usdc), total: total,
pp: Math.round(ppPayoff), action: holderAction, amt: Math.round(holderAmt),
rp: probes.rp, ew: probes.ew, br: probes.br, ml: probes.ml,
liq: Math.round(liq * 1000) / 10, risky: risk.isRisky, safe: risk.isSafe
runActus(usdc, probes, function(pp) { holderAmt = pp; finalize(pp, probes); });
console.log('FINAL: stablecoin4 HOL-ONLY (' + history.length + ' epochs, behavioral probes)');
console.log('Day  Cash        ' + SC + '        Total       Action           Risk       Probes[rp/ew/br/ml]');
var deposits=0, redeems=0, firstDep=0, firstRed=0, secondDep=0;
var risk = s.risky ? '\u26A0\uFE0F RISKY' : (s.safe ? '\u2705 SAFE' : '\u2796 HOLD');
console.log(String(s.day).padStart(3) + '  ' + c + u + t + act + risk + ' ' + pr);
if (s.action==='DEPOSIT') { deposits++; if(!firstDep) firstDep=s.day; if(s.day>27) secondDep=s.day; }
console.log('FINAL: Cash=$' + last.cash + ' ' + SC + '=$' + last.usdc + ' Total=$' + last.total);
console.log('  Portfolio: ' + ((last.total/INIT)*100).toFixed(1) + '% | Deposits: ' + deposits + ' | Redeems: ' + redeems);
console.log('  First DEP: Day ' + firstDep + ' | First RDM: Day ' + firstRed + ' | Re-DEP: Day ' + secondDep);
